author: James C.
pros: It helps to manage data and even update them using simple excel tables; An important feature is that it is not necessary to have extensive knowledge in IT or even professionals in the area; The pre-defined templates help to find many different situations in which the use of data is necessary; Because it works with excel tables, it ends up becoming cross-platform.
cons: Like any new tool, we had problems in the implementation but nothing that was not resolved later

description: Still learning the tool, but believe it is something that will be very useful for our business. The assistance we received from Kapil, however; made this learning process much easier. Kapil was extremely responsive, detailed, and overall a great resource for support.
author: Michael T.
pros: The familiarity of the software that we were replacing (Winshuttle).
cons: The query scripts seem to be overly complicated, especially compared to Winshuttle.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall a good experience but we are in the early stages of using the product. We are about a month away from rolling out the tool to end users so this will have a big impact on our overall experience.
author: Chris C.
pros: The mapping tool is powerful. Using Excel as the end user interface makes it easy for non-technical people to use the software. The tool simplifies mass data load and extraction in/out of SAP. Finally the cost of Process Runner made it more attractive than other tools.
cons: The learning curve for writing scripts is a little steep for people who have had no experience with other tools like Process Runner. Our company is moving from Winshuttle to Process Runner and we are finding some differences between the tools that make it more difficult to create certain scripts.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Suzanne V.
pros: It does what we expect from the tool, mainly uploading mass data to our SAP system. A lot of recordings are available, which makes it easy to use the product.
cons: When you change the mapping in this, it doesn't auto-update the Excel file, which can lead to mistakes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Process Runner : a wonderfull tool to upload/download SAP Data
description: All my SAP data (Purchase, sell, manufacture, HR, Finance, ...) can be created/deleted/updeated in mass much more quickly than manually with a high level of security. I can also make that performed after I have left my office using the scheduler.
author: Pascal C.
pros: Process Runner is very secured and very easy to use for non-IT people. It enables any SAP business user to upload/download and update SAP data in mass in a few seconds.
cons: Franckly, nothing. I far as my business data are in Excel (For this, I can use EDI interfaces or Process Runner Data Extractor), the uploads into SAP are very fast ans secured.

description: It's a fabulous and great experience using Process Runner tool specially with multi functionality features of recording scripts in different modes and using it effortlessly. Specially Process Runner support team is excellent and very co-operative in every situation and helping out of their remit and timelines.
author: Shivam C.
pros: Its Bulk loading capacity and runtime display monitor & efficiency. Different useful modes to record and load the scripts is an excellent feature.
cons: Not that I can think of as of now. Most of the things are just superb, easy to understand & use. Great tool !

review_title: A tool that really saves me time.
author: Thomas C.
pros: What I like most about Process Runner is its simple and intuitive interface. It allows me to quickly and reliably upload data from Excel to SAP without requiring deep technical knowledge. Almost any transaction can be automated, whether in SAP R/3 or S/4HANA. Especially during system migrations, this is a huge advantage because large amounts of data can be processed efficiently.
cons: So far, I have found very few limitations. Only in very complex scenarios is a bit of extra effort needed to get familiar with the setup – but overall, the benefits clearly outweigh this.

description: The overall experience with process runner has been outstanding. We use the application for uploading & downloading the data. It is easy to develop & easy to use in production than the Code changes in SAP. We upload & download Thousands of records from different SAP Modules.
author: Harish Reddy V.
pros: Process Runner is simple to deploy. It doesn't any special access to upload/download the data. In the first we started using Process Runner as a backup application & now it is being competent to the tools like LSMW,DART. The tool is very user friendly. Now in the organization when there is a topic huge/mass upload then we think of Process Runner. Any usecase that needs to be performed on SAP GUI we think on Process Runner. When we struck with something either technical,functional/admin any kind of issues the support we get from the team is really wonderful. They not only fix the issue but will also guide us on adopting to the best ways of working. Thanks to the entire team for being available just a ping/mail away. Looking to continue the relationship with Process Runner & also the great support that we get from the team. The detailed documentation that we have on the Product support page helps us to fix most of the common issues. Thankful to the team for maintaining it detailed. I would also like to add a point that we would be one of the product team within the organization who is saving cost & I am feeling grateful for contributing majorly to this product within my organization.
cons: I would like to get the connectivity to the SAP web portals through Process Runner. I also got communication that this is covered as part of SAAS model, but I am yet to check the feature as we are still on perpetual model. If this is addressed then I can say that all the requirements that we have seen as of now are addressed. Giving control on the program's that are built.

description: I have a big variety of scripts that serves many different transactions. Each script contains examples and I follow these to make sure the data has a good quality.
author: Dominique K.
pros: process Runner is the only way to mass upload data into SAP, it saves us tons of time and hours of boring work, plus it also asure a certain quality of the uploaded data as we can follow patterns that have been used before.
cons: It is kind of complicated to program a script. The excel template is now to be store outside of PR that used to beinkluded, make s it more effort to run a script and you have to be careful where you store it.

review_title: Process Runner definitively worths it, as it saves a lot of operative time.
description: I have used it for a couple of years now, and it is continuously being updated. I highly recommend it for people who need to deal with daily SAP related tasks, this tool will help a lot and save a lot of time.
author: Santiago R.
pros: Definitively, time Saving! Although I´m still not a PRO user, it saves me a lot of time while executing mass changes, creations , etc, on SAP Thanks [sensitive content hidden] for your support on installation.
cons: It could be a bit more user friendly when trying to save new scripts.

description: Muy buena experiencia, recomendable a los usuarios de SAP que realizan cargas masivas
author: Gustavo C.
pros: Permite realizar trabajos rutinarios y de repetición en SAP de una manera mas amena y simple
cons: El soporte solo es en Ingles, podrían ampliar los idiomas para el soporte dado que esta siendo de mas uso el soft en distintos rubros

description: Good Product to upload data in SAP from Excel templates
author: Daniel B.
pros: Nice tool to connect Excel to SAP to make some GL Entries, Create Sales documents, create or update master data or even more to create some customizing in SAP.
cons: Some screens are harder to create templates

description: Je commence a utiliser l'outil, et donc il me faut un certain temps d'adaptation. Par contre ce que j'ai apprécié c'est l'assistance technique que j'ai trouvé pertinente et efficace
author: gilbert A.
pros: La facilité de la prise en main. et le travail de l'outil.
cons: la présentation des différents onglets n'est pas si intuitive que cela

author: Anusha D.
pros: Ease of use- Our Ops team is using this tool without any issues since past 5 years. Ease of Implementation- Upgrading components is very smooth Customer Support- Product team is very supportive.
cons: Doesn't support PaaS database integration
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Amazingly product with friendly support staff.
author: Prashanth I.
pros: 1. User friendly application. 2. Mass upload functionality. 3. Our business is completely dependent on this product.
cons: Always room to improve but overall, the tool does what is promises.

review_title: Sometimes you have these things, that makes life easy
author: Jaap H.
pros: Easiness & speed to setup a process and to change it when it is required.
cons: The vulnerability of local program installation

description: Very positive and with additional functionalities like the DB version, it offers more options.
author: Michel V.
pros: Ease of use with SAP and flexibility to filter and apply rules
cons: Always room to improve but overall the tool does what is promises.

review_title: Process Runner - Easy to implement - Very User Friendly
description: The overall experience with process runner has been outstanding!!! It has done wonders for my department and for our organization. Not only do we use it in 90% of our daily processing, it also has enabled us to develop a solution when we have had needs in others areas of the business on an ad hoc basis. We have realized our investment many times over. Great product!!!
author: James M.
pros: The software was very easy to implement. We did so without IT involvement. The product is extremely user friendly. In SAP, we previously used LSMW's. We changed all of our processes to Process Runner. This allowed us to be more flexible to in meeting every-changing business requirements. We were able to automate processes to the point where reduced staffing by 33%. The product paid for itself in one year.
cons: There really was not anything to not like about the software. At times, the response from customer service was not always helpful the first time around, but we would eventually get there to resolve the issue.

review_title: Process Runner for SAP Master Data Management
description: We were able to greatly improve our mass master data management processes in both speed and accuracy as well as expand the number of data sets we maintained. It reduced training time for our master data team, as well as empowering them to manage the their data without the need for IT resources.
author: Carla P.
pros: It enabled us to move away from the SAP LSMW tool for mass management of master data in SAP. We were able to eliminate the need for a programmer to run mass updates, enabling the work to be done within our master data team with limited IT support on a day-to-day basis.
cons: For a SMB, the cost per license is high.

review_title: Process Runner is the best automation tool .
description: - I have personally used this application it is good for SAP automation so I recommend everyone to use it.
author: piyush A.
pros: - Easily we can create, update and delete data from SAP using Excel.- The best part is that good SAP knowledge is not required as its automation tools manage everything.- Easy to install with just one click.- All the functionalities required for the corporate sector are available.
cons: - In my opinion, sometimes the application crashes in the recording time.

description: For us process runner is a bandaid for automation. It’s versatile, and can be used to fix issues quicker than a code change in SAP that could otherwise take weeks to implement.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With a database license, we use process runner to replace most of the most repetitive tasks in Sap, including order placements, data change, subsitutions/transitions, and document cancellation.
cons: It can get costly, and licensing can be difficult to manage if you don’t go with an enterprise or server license. Since it is generally tied to a user, it’s hard to arrange backups for people who vacation and our primary developer has to work often for an hour even on her vacation days if the business itself is open and running. It’s hardly faster than your fastest employee, but is way more tireless and efficient

author: Ummu Habibah M.
pros: Implementing the application was a delight. We managed to accomplish what we needed to without any help from IT. Very few steps are required to achieve any given task with this software. LSMWs were formerly deployed in SAP. As a result, we migrated all of our routines over to Process Runner. This made us more adaptable to the ever-shifting needs of our company. Due to the automation of operations, we have been able to cut back on personnel by 28%.
cons: Regardless of the transaction, you may require a more in-depth understanding of the functioning, attributes, and specific instructions to save. Adding a new screen or tab is problematic as well and need some more smoother process to it.

review_title: The Key to Efficient SAP Workflow
description: We update thousands of records every day with Process Runner. Our entire Engineering change process is built on it.
author: Cory L.
pros: Process Runner is simple to deploy. It uses existing SAP security and requires no special installation or server-side changes to use. It's simple to get started, but it can do so much. After nearly 10 years, there is no SAP process that Process Runner has not been able to automate. When I do find something I can't figure out, I can turn to customer support and often get a solution in a few hours. Just today, we talked about updating 150,000 line items. Other groups in the business gasped and talked about the days it would take to do. My team just shrugged and told the managers, " We have Process Runner, it'll take a few hours."
cons: I would really like enhanced threading. Multi-thread processes are wonderful, but sometimes updates will fail because the record is locked due to another update. I'd like the ability specify some type of key that tell Process Runner "Don't try to update more then one of these records at a time."

author: sk sajjad A.
pros: Processing of Huge volume of records in a few click and the same file is getting attached to the document.
cons: Nothing as such whatever journal entries you can process manually in SAP is supported by GLSU also.

description: Process Runner es una herramienta efectiva para automatizar tareas concurrentes en el entorno empresarial, ofreciendo una interfaz intuitiva y una amplia compatibilidad con diferentes sistemas.
author: Rosana G.
pros: Tiene una interfaz fácil de usar que permite a los usuarios crear y ejecutar flujos de trabajo sin necesidad de tener conocimientos de programación.
cons: En ocasiones puede presentar algunas limitaciones en la automatización de procesos más complejos.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
